news.summary: Sobi has scheduled the release of its first-quarter 2025 report on April 29, 2025, at 08:00 CET. An invitation is extended to investors, analysts, and the media for a conference call on the same day, scheduled for 15:30 CET, 14:30 GMT, and 09:30 EST. The call will encompass discussions on the company's performance and key insights.
news.headline: Sobi will release Q1 2025 report on April 29 at 08:00 CET. Conference call at 15:30 CET, 14:30 GMT, 09:30 EST.

news.summary: ColorWorks is revolutionizing private label printing for over 2000 coffee brands. Originating in 2017 as a modest coffee roastery, Temecula Coffee Roasters has expanded to support a boarding school in East Africa. Based in Los Alamitos, California, this family-run business has grown significantly in a short time.
news.headline: Temecula Coffee Roasters uses Epson ColorWorks printers to supply private label coffee for thousands of brands.

news.summary: In New York on April 15, 2025, Inception Growth Acquisition Limited (NASDAQ: IGTA) disclosed that on April 10, 2025, they injected $11,199.60 into the Company's Trust Account to prolong the window for finalizing a business merger. This move adds another month, stretching the deadline from April 13, 2025 to May 13, 2025, offering more time to secure a business alliance.
news.headline: Inception Growth Acquisition Limited adds $11,199.60 to trust account, extending business combination period by 1 month.

news.summary: According to recent reports, the number of COVID-19 cases has reached over 5 million worldwide, with over 300,000 confirmed deaths. The United States alone has reported over 1.5 million cases and more than 90,000 deaths. In response to the pandemic, many countries have implemented strict lockdown measures to contain the spread of the virus. Additionally, the global economy has taken a hit, with millions of people losing their jobs and businesses facing unprecedented challenges. Scientists and researchers are working tirelessly to develop a vaccine to combat the virus, but the timeline for its availability remains uncertain. As the situation continues to evolve, governments and healthcare professionals are urging the public to follow guidelines on social distancing and hygiene to protect themselves and others from the virus.
news.headline: Foreign tourists avoiding US to cost economy billions in losses.

news.summary: U.S. stock futures were volatile on Tuesday following a two-day advance, with major benchmark indices showing mixed performance in premarket. President Donald Trump hinted at aiding car companies as they transition production to the U.S. from Canada and Mexico. He exempted smartphones, computers, and semiconductors from reciprocal tariffs but suggested possible duties on imported chips. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.38%, while the two-year bond stood at 3.86%. The FedWatch tool by CME Group projected an 82.7% likelihood of the Federal Reserve maintaining current interest rates in May. Futures showed slight changes ahead of the opening bell: Dow Jones (-0.03%), S&P 500 (+0.08%), Nasdaq 100 (+0.25%), Russell 2000 (-0.12%). SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF were up in premarket trading. Tech stocks led Monday's gains with Apple and Dell showing strong performances, while Financials were mixed with Goldman Sachs beating expectations but M&T Bank falling short. Real estate, utilities, and consumer staples sectors saw significant gains while consumer discretionary stocks declined. As of Monday's close, the Dow Jones index was 10.1% below its 52-week high.
news.headline: US stock futures were volatile post 2-day rally, Trump hinted at tariff moves. Futures mixed, 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.38%. Dow -0.03%, S&P 0.08%, Nasdaq 0.25%, Russell -0.12%. Apple stocks surged 2.2%, Dow 10.1% lower than 52-week high.

news.summary: KUKA Home, a prominent home furnishing brand from China, stood out at Milan Design Week with its distinctive blend of Eastern wisdom and modern aesthetics. The brand impressed attendees with its unique design philosophy, showcasing the creativity and influence of China's home furnishing sector on a global stage. This year, KUKA Home attracted attention at one of the premier design events worldwide, emphasizing its growing presence in the industry. The event marked a significant milestone for the brand as it continues to make its mark on the international design scene.
news.headline: KUKA Home shines at Milan Design Week with Eastern-inspired furnishing, showcasing China's global influence.

news.summary: The event logistics sector is experiencing growth due to an increasing demand for smooth event management, advancements in supply chain and transportation technologies, and the uptake of digital and automated solutions to improve event organization and operational effectiveness. These factors have contributed to a significant rise in the market, with current value estimates reaching significant numbers.
news.headline: Event logistics market to grow to $123.8 billion by 2033 with 6.5% CAGR, driven by demand for seamless event execution and technological advancements.

news.summary: POPOSOAP, a company based in Newark, New Jersey, announced on April 15, 2025, its focus on smart water features and eco-friendly pond care. They are introducing new sustainability and wildlife-friendly pond innovations for 2025. This initiative aims to enhance the environmental impact of their products.
news.headline: POPOSOAP in Newark evolves as eco-friendly pond care leader with innovative features by 2025.

news.summary: Anthem Blue Cross and the Anthem Blue Cross Foundation are increasing their assistance efforts in response to the recent Southern California fires. They have revealed the latest beneficiaries of their $10 million fire relief program to aid in immediate community response and support long-term recovery and reconstruction initiatives. Over $7 million of the funds have been allocated so far.
news.headline: Anthem Blue Cross donates $10 million for SoCal fire recovery, $7 million already distributed. #communityaid

news.summary: Gilat Defense is set to supply cutting-edge antenna technology for integration into defense communication systems. This advanced technology will enhance the capabilities of the systems, enabling more robust and secure communication channels. The contract, valued at a significant amount, underscores the commitment to strengthening defense infrastructure and improving operational efficiency. This partnership highlights Gilat Defense's expertise in providing innovative solutions for critical defense needs.
news.headline: Gilat secures multimillion order from global defense organization for advanced antenna technology.

news.summary: In Redwood City, California, Moloco, a prominent figure in operational machine learning and performance advertising, has unveiled insights from its recent study on the 2025 State of Mobile Gaming. This research delves into the In-App Purchase Trends of top apps and reveals significant changes occurring among the top 100 gaming advertisers. The mobile gaming sector is experiencing a transformative phase, moving towards growth after navigating through robust expansions and subsequent adjustments. This industry is witnessing ongoing development, showcasing promising trends for the future.
news.headline: Moloco's research reveals new trends in mobile gaming industry, showing a shift among top 100 advertisers as industry enters a phase of growth.

news.summary: In New York, DigitalOwl recently unveiled its latest innovation - the Self-Serve portal. This groundbreaking technology, powered by advanced AI, aims to streamline the analysis of intricate medical data for legal purposes. Specifically created and optimized by a team of internal specialists, the AI system is tailored for legal applications, promising to enhance the efficiency of legal practitioners. By automating tasks such as medical record assessments and demand package creation, this platform is projected to drastically reduce the time spent by lawyers on these processes. Ultimately, the Self-Serve portal is anticipated to be a game-changer for legal professionals, offering them the opportunity to boost productivity and accuracy in their workflows.
news.headline: DigitalOwl introduces Self-Serve portal to help lawyers save time on medical record reviews, demand package drafting.

news.summary: Renoworks Software Inc. reported its annual and fourth quarter financial results for 2024, showcasing a strong performance. In 2024, the company saw revenue increase by 10% to $6,942,578, recurring revenue rose by 20% to $1,961,850, and deferred revenue increased by 54% to $2,519,797. Gross margin improved to 74%, net profit was $133,058, and adjusted EBITDA was $222,210. Cash balance at year-end was $1,536,371. In the fourth quarter of 2024, revenue was $1,732,703, recurring revenue increased by 18% to $662,321, and gross margin was 74%. Net income for the quarter was $135,931. Renoworks experienced a 10% growth in revenues for the fiscal year, driven by a 23% increase in licensing revenue. These results reflect the company's strategic focus on expanding its solutions and optimizing operational efficiency.
news.headline: Renoworks reports 2024 fiscal year revenue of $6,942,578 (up 10%) and net profit of $133,058, a significant turnaround.

news.summary: HLAA is launching community awareness events in 20 U.S. cities starting in May. According to a press release from ROCKVILLE, Md. on April 15, 2025, hearing loss is a significant issue affecting many Americans. The number of individuals with this invisible disability is on the rise.
news.headline: HLAA's Nationwide Walk4Hearing supports thousands with hearing loss in 20 U.S. cities in 2025. (Character count: 98)

news.summary: In Pittsburgh and Chicago, JELL-O, known for over 125 years for its tasty offerings, is venturing into the plant-based market with the launch of JELL-O Oat Milk Chocolate Pudding. This new product, now available in stores across the country, retains the classic creamy texture and rich chocolate flavor loved by JELL-O enthusiasts, while being both lactose-free and vegan. This move signifies a significant shift for the pudding category leader into the plant-based industry, marking a first for Kraft.
news.headline: JELL-O introduces first plant-based chocolate pudding, JELL-O Oat Milk Chocolate Pudding, for vegans, lactose-free.

news.summary: A Phase 1/2 trial has commenced for ATX-295, a promising oral inhibitor of KIF18A, targeting patients with advanced solid tumors such as ovarian cancer. The FDA has awarded Fast Track designation to Accent's primary clinical-stage projects, ATX-295 and ATX-559. This Fast Track designation aims to expedite the review process for these potential breakthrough treatments.
news.headline: Accent Therapeutics has dosed first patient in Phase 1/2 trial for KIF18A inhibitor ATX-295, with FDA Fast Track for ATX-295 and DHX9 inhibitor ATX-559. Study for advanced cancers, including ovarian, initiated with potential best-in-class oral inhibitor.

news.summary: In Anchorage, Alaska on April 15, 2025, U.S. GoldMining Inc. (NASDAQ: USGO) shared plans for an initial economic assessment for the Whistler Gold-Copper Project. The project is situated 105 miles away.
news.headline: U.S. GoldMining Inc. to start initial economic assessment at Whistler Gold-Copper Project in Alaska. NASDAQ: USGO.

news.summary: Hunt Oil Company of Peru L.L.C., Sucursal del Perú ("HOCP"), based in Lima, Peru, stated on April 15, 2025, that it has decided to prolong the Expiration Time in relation to its earlier proclaimed tender offers. All other terms and conditions for the offers will stay the same. The specific extended time period was not mentioned in the provided information.
news.headline: Hunt Oil Company of Peru extends deadlines for tender offers, all terms remain unchanged. Lima, Peru. April 15, 2025.

news.summary: Immerse yourself in the unique world of KURIOS – Cabinet of Curiosities with Parallel!, a cutting-edge digital platform offering an interactive experience. This innovative platform allows viewers to delve into behind-the-scenes action, follow the performers, and fully engage in the show. The innovative experience is brought to you by Cirque du Soleil and is set to launch on April 15, 2025, in Montreal. This development is set to transform the way audiences engage with entertainment, bringing a new dimension to live performances.
news.headline: Cirque du Soleil launches interactive digital platform Parallel! offering backstage access to fans. Show - KURIOS.

news.summary: In Irvine, California, on April 15, 2025, Comtrend, a prominent company specializing in broadband access products and solutions, announced a partnership with Netceed, a leading value-added distributor catering to industries such as telecom, traffic, and digital infrastructure. This strategic collaboration is set to enhance services for service providers in various sectors.
news.headline: Comtrend and Netceed collaborate to provide high-speed fiber broadband solutions to service providers in North America.

news.summary: Today, in Victoria, Seychelles, MEXC, a prominent global cryptocurrency exchange, revealed plans to introduce WalletConnect Network (WCT) on April 15, 2025 (UTC). Users can expect Airdrop+ incentives, with a combined total of 273,000 WCT and 50,000 USDT up for grabs. WalletConnect, a key player in the industry, will soon be available for trading on the platform.
news.headline: MEXC to list WalletConnect (WCT) with 273K WCT & 50K USDT rewards for Airdrop+ event.

news.summary: In Norwich, England, on April 15, 2025, Homemove revealed that it has closed a funding round amounting to $5 million. The round was spearheaded by Fuel Ventures and marks a significant milestone for the proptech brand. Homemove's platform offers users a seamless solution for overseeing every aspect of their home relocation, all through a user-friendly interface.
news.headline: Homemove secures $5 million to revolutionize home moving process with proptech platform.

news.summary: Don't miss the chance to explore the latest in kiosks and digital signage at the National Restaurant Association Show in Westminster, Colorado on April 15, 2025. Visit Booth 8030, where the Kiosk Manufacturer Association (KMA) will be showcasing cutting-edge self-order kiosks and smart food vending. Learn more about the exciting advancements in these technologies firsthand at the NRA site.
news.headline: Visit Booth 8030 at National Restaurant Association Show for kiosks & digital signage. Self-order kiosks and smart food vending showcased.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, in Missoula, Montana, onX, renowned for digital outdoor navigation, launched its latest app, onX Fish Midwest, marking a substantial venture into the fishing sector. The onX Fish app was developed over the past year, with onX collecting feedback from users and experts in the industry to tailor the app to meet the needs of fishing enthusiasts. This expansion underscores onX's commitment to providing innovative solutions for outdoor enthusiasts seeking to enhance their fishing experiences.
news.headline: onX Fish Midwest introduced by onX for fishing industry, expanding navigation apps, developed over past 12 months.

news.summary: New revelations on the correlation between the gut and brain have been uncovered by a highly acclaimed individual. This individual is a renowned cardiothoracic surgeon, expert in regenerative medicine, a four-time bestseller on the New York Times list, and host of a top-ranking podcast. The latest information was released on April 15, 2025, in New York.
news.headline: Dr. Steven Gundry releases book on gut-brain connection, promising mood improvement and disease reversal. New York Times bestselling author reveals groundbreaking insights.

news.summary: The creator of a well-known seasonal decoration company expressed concerns about tariffs impacting the holiday season, urging for specific measures to safeguard American families and customs. The founder, Daniel G. Flaherty, highlighted the potential negative effects of these tariffs, which could lead to higher costs and disruptions amidst the approaching holidays. The plea for targeted relief comes amid fears of detrimental consequences, with the aim of preserving cherished traditions for U.S. households.
news.headline: Holiday toy CEO urges Trump to reconsider tariffs that threaten Christmas & American jobs, warning of price hike & disruption. Targeted relief needed.

news.summary: Kraton Corporation, a prominent global producer of specialty polymers and bio-based products from pine wood pulping co-products, recently revealed a price hike in North America for SBS. The increase will impact various products and will be effective starting April 15, 2025. This move is part of the company's efforts to ensure sustainability and maintain quality in its offerings.
news.headline: Kraton Corp increases prices for SBS, SIS, and HSBC products in North America. Key details: effective May 1,2025, by 11-17%.

news.summary: A technology company, Canaan Inc. (NASDAQ: CAN), known for its advancements in crypto mining, is set to join the Jefferies Power x Coin Virtual Conference on April 16, 2025, scheduled for 2 pm ET. This announcement was made today in Singapore. Attendees can learn more about the company's involvement in the event through various channels.
news.headline: Canaan Inc. (NASDAQ: CAN) to join Jefferies Power x Coin Virtual Conference on April 16, 2025, at 2 pm ET.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, in Shanghai, Daqo New Energy Corp. (NYSE: DQ) disclosed its intention to publish the unaudited financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2025. Daqo New Energy is a top producer of high-purity polysilicon for the worldwide solar photovoltaic sector.
news.headline: Daqo New Energy to release Q1 2025 results on April 29. Leading polysilicon manufacturer (NYSE: DQ).

news.summary: A recent investment has allowed NetRise to expand its solutions to a wider market and tackle issues surrounding software supply chain security. The company, based in Austin, Texas, made this announcement on April 15, 2025. NetRise is recognized as the industry leader in this sector, assisting businesses in cataloguing software assets and detecting vulnerabilities. This investment will empower NetRise to further strengthen its presence in the market, with the aim of enhancing software supply chain security.
news.headline: NetRise secures $10M to expand software supply chain solutions, enhancing visibility and risk management.

news.summary: Kalmar Corporation announced that its January-March 2025 interim report will be published on April 29, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. EEST. A live international telephone conference will take place at 10:00 a.m. EEST on the same day, conducted in English and presented by President & CEO Sami Niiranen and CFO Sakari Ahdekivi. Participants can register for the teleconference via a provided link to ask questions during the event. The report will be available on Kalmar's website post-publication, along with presentation materials. The company, operating globally in over 120 countries with around 5,200 employees, aims to revolutionize the material handling sector sustainably. In 2024, Kalmar generated sales of approximately EUR 1.7 billion. For additional details, one can contact Carina Geber-Teir or Camilla Maikola. To keep updated, subscribing to Kalmar's releases or visiting their website is advised.
news.headline: Kalmar will release its Jan-Mar 2025 interim report on April 29, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. EEST. A live conference at 10:00 a.m. EEST will be held in English. Kalmar operates in over 120 countries and had sales of EUR 1.7 billion in 2024, employing around 5,200 people.
CNH will announce Q1 2025 financial results on May 1.
TRX Gold's Q2 2025 results revealed in latest report.

news.summary: First Atlantic has released the metallurgical test results from drill hole AN-24-03 at the RPM Zone. This marks the second of four drill holes with recovery data. Key numbers include recovery rates and concentrations of valuable minerals.
news.headline: First Atlantic Nickel announces DTR results: 1.32% Ni & 1.95% Cr in 216 meter drill hole AN-24-03 at RPM Zone.

news.summary: Beneficiewill be hosting a live webcast to provide a corporate update at the upcoming Emerging Growth Conference on Thursday, April 17, 2025, at 4:10 p.m. Eastern Daylight Time.
news.headline: Beneficient to give corporate update at Emerging Growth Conference on April 17, 2025, at 4:10 p.m. EDT.

news.summary: Starting in January 2026, AAdvantage members will have access to complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi on a greater number of aircraft than any other domestic airline. This exclusive benefit will allow members to enjoy fast internet connectivity while flying.
news.headline: American Airlines and AT&T will offer free high-speed Wi-Fi to AAdvantage members starting Jan 2026, more than any other domestic carrier.

news.summary: A growth-oriented energy company, U.S. Energy Corp (NASDAQ: USEG), based in Houston, disclosed its participation at the Emerging Growth Conference on April 16, 2025. Specialized in managing a selection of top-performing assets, the Company will showcase its operations at the event.
news.headline: U.S. Energy Corp. will present at Emerging Growth Conference on April 16, 2025; a growth-focused energy company.

news.summary: Verona Pharma plc (Nasdaq: VRNA) will reveal its financial results for the initial quarter ending March 31, 2025, on April 29, 2025. The announcement will be accompanied by an investment community conference call at 9:00 a.m. EDT / 2:00 p.m. BST to review the financial outcomes and offer a corporate update.
news.headline: Verona Pharma to report Q1 2025 financial results on April 29, 2025; conference call at 9:00 a.m. EDT / 2:00 p.m. BST.

news.summary: TotalEnergies has entered into an agreement with Energia Natural Dominicana (ENADOM) in the Dominican Republic for the annual delivery of 400,000 tons of LNG. The agreement, subject to finalization of SPAs, is scheduled to commence in mid-2027 and will last for 15 years. The price will be linked to Henry Hub. This deal will allow ENADOM to provide natural gas for the 470 MW combined-cycle power plant.
news.headline: TotalEnergies to Supply 400,000 Tons/year of LNG for 15 Years to the Dominican Republic, starting 2027, price indexed to Henry Hub.
